project_overview.description: Multi-module Leadership LMS with quiz functionality, student enrollment tracking, and progress management

core_issues_resolved.description: Earlier mismatch between currentSession and studentSession; quiz now reads correct session data for studentId and enrollmentId
Quiz attempts table created with proper schema; POST /api/student/module/:moduleId/quiz/submit endpoint working
Added proper call to /api/student/module/:moduleId/complete when quiz is passed; updates module_progress and enrollment progress
Addressed via cache-busting strategies (renamed to quiz-component-v2.js, version query params)
Quiz component now supports single_choice, multiple_choice, and true_false question types with proper radio/checkbox rendering
YouTube video embeds removed due to availability issues
Red 'HARD' badge removed per user request

quiz_endpoints.description: Load quiz questions for a module
quiz_endpoints.returns: Array of quiz_questions with question_type, options, points, etc.

quiz_endpoints.description: Load previous quiz attempts for a student
quiz_endpoints.returns: Array of quiz_attempts with scores, passed status, etc.

quiz_endpoints.description: Submit quiz answers, calculate score, save attempt
quiz_endpoints.returns: Quiz attempt result with passed status, percentage, feedback

module_completion.description: Mark module as completed, update enrollment progress
updates: Sets completion_date if all modules completed

diagnostic_endpoints.description: Diagnostic endpoint for debugging quiz data

renderFailedResults() - shows failure UI with retake option
getQuestionTypeLabel(type) - returns badge HTML for question type

quiz_not_loading: Verify studentId and enrollmentId in session
Check if quiz questions exist in database for the module
module_completion_not_working: Check console for '[QuizComponent] Marking module as complete...' log

Verify enrollmentId is not null in request
multiple_choice_not_working: Check if checkboxes render instead of radio buttons

supabase_verification_queries.check_module_1_questions: SELECT question_type, COUNT(*), AVG(points), SUM(points) FROM quiz_questions WHERE module_id IN (SELECT id FROM modules WHERE title = 'Module 1: Introduction to Leadership') GROUP BY question_type;
supabase_verification_queries.check_quiz_attempts: SELECT * FROM quiz_attempts WHERE student_id = 'YOUR_STUDENT_ID' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
supabase_verification_queries.check_module_progress: SELECT m.title, mp.status, mp.completed_at FROM module_progress mp JOIN modules m ON m.id = mp.module_id WHERE mp.student_id = 'YOUR_STUDENT_ID' ORDER BY m.order_number;
supabase_verification_queries.check_enrollment_progress: SELECT student_id, course_id, modules_completed, total_modules, progress_percentage, completion_date FROM enrollments WHERE student_id = 'YOUR_STUDENT_ID';
supabase_verification_queries.delete_module_1_attempts: DELETE FROM quiz_attempts WHERE module_id IN (SELECT id FROM modules WHERE title = 'Module 1: Introduction to Leadership');

question_type_rendering.note: Radio for single_choice and true_false, checkbox for multiple_choice

answer_collection.pattern: For checkboxes: collect all checked values into array. For radio: single value.

grading_logic.pattern: If answer is array: JSON.stringify(sorted arrays) comparison. Else: direct string comparison.
grading_logic.note: Handles multiple-choice by sorting both expected and submitted answers

module_completion.note: Shows success alert, then redirects to /student/dashboard
